name: The Enchanted World of Brambly Hedge
original_name: The Enchanted World of Brambly Hedge
overview: The Enchanted World of Brambly Hedge is a stop-motion animated series based on the Brambly Hedge books by Jill Barklem. The show was produced by Reader's Digest Video and Hit Entertainment; in the United States, episodes began airing on the Starz premium channel in 1997.
